title: urticastrum divaricatum
intro: Urticastrum divaricatum, commonly known as the divaricate nettle tree or nettle-leaved stinging nettle, is a perennial plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Urticastrum divaricatum include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be applied topically as a poultice or salve to treat skin irritations and wounds.
